v0.1.description: Initial Release. Should be fully functional. Needs testing (works on my machine~).
v0.1.title: apworld v0.1

v0.2.description:
Add new goal locations, location dependency logic, and slot data improvements

New location checks (10 goals):
- DOOOOMED, GOD_DAMMIT (1 tier each)
- WEAKEST_LINKS, CRUMBLING_DEFENSES (4 tiers each)
- TWENTY_EIGHT_SECONDS_LATER (1 tier)
- ANIMAL_RIGHTS_VIOLATIONS (4 tiers)
- CATJEETASTROPHIC (2 tiers, chains off MIGRANT_WORKERS)
- HOARDER (4 tiers), WHATS_THAT_SMELL (2 tiers)
- MIGRANT_WORKERS (4 tiers)

Goal adjustments:
- YOU_ALREADY_LOST: 5 tiers → 1 tier
- RISE_TO_RICHES: remove MARKETPLACE requirement, keep FORGE only
- LITERAL_DUMPSTER_FIRE: add goal_requires=HOARDER to match in-game goal web

Location logic (regions.py rewrite):
- Tier N > 1: requires can_reach(same goal tier N-1)
- Tier 1 with goal_requires: requires can_reach(prerequisite goal last tier)
- Item requirements use non-transitive direct deps only

Slot data:
- Add location_id_to_item to fill_slot_data() so the Java client can
  display which item was at a checked location
v0.2.title: apworld v0.2

v0.3.description:
## Commit: "Some logic fixes"

### `regions.py`
- Wired up the new `requires_any` condition into the access rule builder — adds an `any(state.has(...))` lambda when a goal has a `requires_any` list.

### `locations.py`

#### Data model changes
- Added `requires_any` field to `GoalDef` and `_g()` helper — for goals that need **at least one** of a list of items (vs. `requires` which needs **all** of them).

#### New item requirements added to previously unrestricted goals

| Goal | Change |
|---|---|
| `DEFORESTATION` | requires `LUMBER_SHACK` |
| `QUARRY` | requires `MINING_FACILITY` |
| `KYLE_POWERED` | requires `CRYSTAL_HARVESTRY` |
| `INDUSTRY` | requires_any `LUMBER_MILL` or `STONE_CUTTERY` |
| `DIGGY_DIGGY_HOLE` | requires `WAY_MAKER_SHACK` |
| `PORTER` | added `ESSENCE_COLLECTOR` (alongside existing `MIGRATION_WAY_STATION`) |
| `POWER_OVERWHELMING` | requires `ESSENCE_COLLECTOR` |
| `PRODIGIOUS_PLANNER` | requires_any any storage building |
| `TOWER_DEFENSE` | requires_any any tower (including `GOD_TOWER`) |
| `RETROFIT` | requires `FORGE`, `LUMBER_MILL`, `STONE_CUTTERY`, `CRYSTILLERY` |
| `CRUMBLING_DEFENSES` | requires_any any wall type |
| `NEVER_GONNA_GIVE_YOU_UP` | requires `RECALL` |
| `WILD_GROWTH` | requires `MOTIVATE_LAND` |
v0.3.title: apworld v0.3
